title: Bee Removal in New Rochelle, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in New Rochelle, Westchester. Safe, humane bee hive removal from homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 service.
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout New Rochelle, Westchester County. Our licensed technicians safely remove bee colonies from residential and commercial properties, protecting your family and preserving these important pollinators. Whether you're dealing with bees in your attic, walls, or outdoor structures, we offer fast, humane removal at competitive rates of $350-$550.
whyUs: With years of experience serving New Rochelle and surrounding Westchester communities, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with proven bee removal techniques. Our team responds quickly to bee emergencies, uses eco-friendly methods, and provides thorough inspections to prevent future infestations in your New Rochelle property.
localContext: New Rochelle's diverse architecture—from historic homes near Paine Avenue to modern condos along the waterfront and the established neighborhoods around Hudson Park—can all attract bee colonies seeking shelter. Our technicians are familiar with the unique pest control challenges presented by New Rochelle's mix of pre-war buildings, suburban homes, and commercial properties along North Avenue and Main Street.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in New Rochelle typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the size of the colony, location of the hive, and accessibility. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a bee problem in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most bee removal requests in New Rochelle and throughout Westchester County. For emergency situations involving aggressive bees or allergic residents, we prioritize immediate response to ensure your safety.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we use humane bee removal methods that allow for relocation rather than extermination. Our goal is to safely remove the colony from your property while preserving these beneficial pollinators. We work with local beekeepers when appropriate to rehome healthy colonies.

faqs.question: What types of properties do you service in New Rochelle?
faqs.answer: We provide bee removal services for all property types in New Rochelle, including single-family homes, multi-unit buildings, condominiums, commercial properties, schools, and municipal buildings. Our technicians have experience working with both historic and modern structures throughout the area.
